Scratch — 4 boats, 3 races, 1 discard; DNE cannot be discarded even when it is the worst score

RRS: DNE (Disqualification Not Excludable) is a protest-committee disqualification that shall not be excluded from series scoring. Like DSQ but the DNE flag prevents discard selection. DNE scores N+1 using the dnfScoring setting (starters or entries). With 4 entered boats and seriesEntries scoring, DNE = 5.

Scoring configuration: 1 discard from race 3. DNF/OCS scoring: A5.2 (series entries).

Alice gets DNE — worst possible score (5 pts) but non-discardable.
    Her next-worst discardable score is 1 (R1 or R2); discard one of those.
Alice: R1=1, R2=1, R3=5(DNE,non-disc). Total=7. Discard worst discardable=1(R1). Net=6.
Bob:   R1=2, R2=2, R3=1.               Total=5. Discard worst=2(R1).             Net=3.
Carol: R1=3, R2=3, R3=2.               Total=8. Discard worst=3(R1).             Net=5.
David: R1=4, R2=4, R3=3.               Total=11. Discard worst=4(R1).            Net=7.
Rank Sail Boat Competitor R1 R2 R3 Total Nett
1st 22 Bob (2) 2 1 5 3
2nd 33 Carol (3) 3 2 8 5
3rd 11 Alice (1) 1 5 DNE 7 6
4th 44 David (4) 4 3 11 7
